title: Predicting spin-orbit coupling in hole spin qubit arrays with vision-transformer-based neural networks on a generalized Hubbard model
summary: We introduce a neural-network-based machine learning method to predict the effective spin-orbit coupling (SOC) strength in hole quantum dot arrays from standard charge stability diagrams. Specifically, we study a $2\times 2$ Ge hole quantum dot array described by a generalized spin-orbit coupled Hubbard model that incorporates random site- and bond-dependent disorder in all system parameters, including onsite potentials, Coulomb interaction strengths, interdot tunneling amplitudes, as well as the direction and angle of the SOC-induced spin rotations accompanying interdot tunneling. We train the neural network on numerically simulated charge stability diagrams from nearest-neighbor pairs of quantum dots for different chemical potentials and out-of-plane magnetic fields, and show that this enables us to predict the SOC-induced spin-flip tunneling amplitudes -- and, thus, the effective SOC strength -- with high fidelity ($R^2\approx 0.94$) even when all other Hubbard model parameters are unknown. Furthermore, our neural network can also predict the other Hubbard model parameters with high fidelity, demonstrating that neural-network-based approaches can be a powerful tool for the automated characterization of hole spin qubit arrays.

AI.tldr: 使用神经网络从电荷稳定性图预测空穴量子点阵列的有效自旋轨道耦合强度
AI.motivation: 空穴量子点阵列中的自旋轨道耦合对自旋量子比特性能至关重要，但传统表征方法复杂且耗时。需要开发自动化、高效的方法来从标准测量数据中提取关键参数。
AI.method: 基于神经网络的方法：1) 构建2×2 Ge空穴量子点阵列的广义自旋轨道耦合Hubbard模型；2) 包含所有系统参数的随机无序；3) 在数值模拟的电荷稳定性图上训练神经网络；4) 使用最近邻量子点对的化学势和垂直磁场数据。
AI.result: 神经网络能够高精度预测自旋翻转隧穿振幅（R²≈0.94），从而确定有效SOC强度，即使其他Hubbard模型参数未知。网络还能高精度预测其他Hubbard模型参数。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络方法可作为自动化表征空穴自旋量子比特阵列的强大工具，为量子计算硬件的快速表征和优化提供了新途径。

title: Surface Response, Plasma Modes of coated Multi-Layered anisotropic Semi-Dirac Heterostructures
summary: We derived closed-form analytical expressions for the surface response functions (SRFs) for heterostructure. We investigate structures consisting of up to three layered, coated heterostructure of two-dimensional (2D) materials with a dielectric medium or vacuum interface. The dielectric media serves to inhibit charge transfer between layers for the case when a pair of 2D layers serve as coatings for a dielectric film. Our results revise the established picture for the dispersion equation for two layers of reduced dimensionality surrounded by dielectric media. An impinging electromagnetic field incident on the surface leads to Coulomb coupled plasma excitations in the structure which are yielded by the SRF. This is achieved by employing Maxwell's equations and linear response theory. We use these results to investigate the plasmonic properties of tilted semi-Dirac materials both analytically and numerically. Closed-form analytical expressions are derived for the plasmon dispersions in the long wavelength limit for single and double layers. We numerically obtain density plots of the loss functions and observe anisotropic behavior in different momentum directions. For the cases when there are two or three layers, we observe two plasmon branches corresponding to in-phase and out-of-phase charge density oscillations, where the in-phase optical modes have higher intensity than the out-of-phase acoustic modes. We calculated the optical absorption spectra for plasma modes in layered semi-Dirac materials produced by an external electromagnetic field carrying an electric polarization and frequency. Possible applications include durable protection coatings providing UV resistance, chemical protection and improving upon traditional ceramic coatings.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了异质结构表面响应函数的闭式解析表达式，研究了二维材料涂层异质结构的等离子体性质，特别关注倾斜半狄拉克材料，并探讨了其在防护涂层中的应用。
AI.motivation: 研究二维材料异质结构的表面响应函数和等离子体激发，修正传统介电介质中二维层色散方程的现有理论，探索倾斜半狄拉克材料的各向异性等离子体特性。
AI.method: 采用麦克斯韦方程组和线性响应理论推导表面响应函数的闭式解析表达式，对单层和双层结构在长波长极限下推导等离子体色散的解析表达式，并通过数值计算获得损耗函数的密度图。
AI.result: 获得了异质结构表面响应函数的闭式解析解，观察到倾斜半狄拉克材料在不同动量方向上的各向异性行为，对于双层和三层结构观察到对应于同相和反相电荷密度振荡的两个等离子体分支，其中同相光学模式强度高于反相声学模式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功推导了二维材料异质结构的表面响应函数解析表达式，揭示了倾斜半狄拉克材料的各向异性等离子体特性，为开发具有紫外抵抗和化学保护功能的耐久防护涂层提供了理论基础。

title: Controlled topological dilution drives cooperative glassy dynamics in artificial spin ice
summary: It has long been known that disorder, perturbing the energy landscape of magnetic systems, can introduce glassy dynamics. However, the controlled role of increasing disorder in driving glass formation remains difficult to isolate in naturally occurring materials. Artificial spin ice offers a unique model platform in which geometry, interactions, and disorder can be engineered at the nanoscale. Here, we investigate the impact of controlled disorder introduced through random decimation in artificial square spin ice. By systematically removing nanomagnets from random sites, we modify the vertex topology and progressively increase frustration in the spin network. Synchrotron-based photoemission electron microscopy reveals that decimation enhances the population of higher energy vertices and increases the configurational entropy of the system. Time-resolved temperature-dependent imaging further shows the emergence of slow cooperative dynamics at higher decimation, characterized by aging, a finite Edwards--Anderson order parameter, and enhanced dynamical heterogeneity quantified by the four-point susceptibility. The relaxation dynamics transition from thermally activated behavior at low decimation to Vogel--Fulcher--type freezing at higher decimation. These results demonstrate that random decimation drives artificial spin ice from long-range order to a glass-like magnetic state, establishing artificial spin systems as a tunable platform for studying glassy dynamics in frustrated matter.

AI.tldr: 通过随机移除纳米磁体引入可控无序，人工自旋冰从长程有序转变为类玻璃磁态，展示了人工自旋系统作为研究玻璃动力学的可调平台。
AI.motivation: 研究无序在驱动玻璃形成中的可控作用，传统材料中难以隔离这种效应，人工自旋冰提供了几何、相互作用和无序可工程化的独特平台。
AI.method: 在人工方形自旋冰中通过随机移除纳米磁体引入可控无序，使用同步辐射光电子显微镜进行时间分辨的温度依赖成像，分析顶点拓扑、构型熵和动力学特性。
AI.result: 随机移除增强了高能顶点数量，增加了构型熵，在高移除率下出现缓慢合作动力学（老化、有限Edwards-Anderson序参数、增强的动态异质性），弛豫动力学从热激活行为转变为Vogel-Fulcher型冻结。
AI.conclusion: 随机移除驱动人工自旋冰从长程有序转变为类玻璃磁态，确立了人工自旋系统作为研究受挫物质中玻璃动力学的可调平台。

title: Valley polarization of chiral excitonic bound states induced by band geometry
summary: Van der Waals (vdW) materials provide a rich platform for exploring the interplay of interactions, topology, and paired-electron phases. We study how the Berry phase reshapes excitonic pairing in a double-well dispersion representative of layered vdW systems. By computing the temperature-versus-Berry flux phase diagram of the system, we find parameter ranges where finite angular momentum excitons are favored, including chiral states. Strikingly, the condensed angular momentum channel evolves with Berry flux, revealing a pairing problem with no analogue in a hydrogen atom in a uniform magnetic field, where angular momentum states never cross. We then turn to a model of multilayer rhombohedral graphene and examine the effects of trigonal warping. Once continuous rotational symmetry is broken, excitons mix multiple angular momenta, and for a range of parameters we find a variety of linear combination of angular momenta ($s, p, f$ and $g$) in the ground state. Our results point to the possibility of chiral excitonic condensates, and spontaneous symmetry breaking through many-body condensation.

AI.tldr: 研究范德华材料中贝里相位如何重塑激子配对，发现贝里通量可导致有限角动量激子（包括手性态）成为基态，并在多层菱面体石墨烯中观察到角动量混合现象。
AI.motivation: 探索范德华材料中相互作用、拓扑和配对电子相之间的关联，特别是贝里相位如何影响激子配对，为寻找手性激子凝聚体和自发对称性破缺提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用双阱色散模型研究贝里通量对激子配对的影响，计算温度-贝里通量相图；建立多层菱面体石墨烯模型，分析三角扭曲效应下角动量混合现象。
AI.result: 发现贝里通量可导致有限角动量激子（包括手性态）成为基态，角动量通道随贝里通量演化；在三角扭曲破坏连续旋转对称性时，激子混合多种角动量（s、p、f、g），形成复杂的线性组合基态。
AI.conclusion: 贝里相位显著重塑激子配对行为，为手性激子凝聚体和通过多体凝聚实现自发对称性破缺提供了可能，揭示了范德华材料中拓扑与配对相之间的深刻联系。

title: Visualizing the interplay of dual electronic nematicities in kagome superconductors
summary: Kagome superconductor AV$_3$Sb$_5$ (A stands for K, Rb, and Cs) hosts a wealth of intertwined electronic orders driven by geometric frustration and electron correlations. Among them, the breaking of rotational and/or time-reversal symmetry, observed within the triple-$Q$ charge density wave (CDW) phase yet exhibiting a more complex temperature dependence, remains a central puzzle. Here, by using scanning tunneling microscopy to study the electronic structures of CsV$_3$Sb$_5$ as a function of temperature and Ti doping, we disentangle the interrelation between two distinct nematic order parameters, one associated with the CDW and the other manifested as $C_2$ distortion of the V-$d_{x^{2}-y^{2}}$ Fermi pockets without breaking transition symmetry. The latter persists to high doping levels and high temperatures where the long-range CDW is fully suppressed. Moreover, its nematic director is oriented in a lattice direction distinct from that of the CDW-induced nematicity at intermediate doping, and eventually aligns with the strong nematic CDW order in the pristine compound where the quasiparticles of vanadium orbitals become coherent below a lower characteristic temperature. These observations, combined with Ginzburg-Landau analysis, reveal a rich interplay between two nematic orders that can be assigned to distinct kagome-lattice orbitals. Our results shed new light on the enigmatic intertwined orders in this family and establish a rare material platform in which dual nematic orders coexist and couple to give rise to unusual correlated phenomena.

AI.tldr: CsV3Sb5 kagome超导体中存在两种不同的向列序：一种与电荷密度波相关，另一种来自V-dx2-y2费米口袋的C2畸变，两者共存并耦合产生不寻常的关联现象。
AI.motivation: 理解Kagome超导体AV3Sb5中复杂的电子序，特别是三重Q电荷密度波相中观察到的旋转对称性和/或时间反演对称性破缺，这些现象表现出复杂的温度依赖性，是该领域的核心难题。
AI.method: 使用扫描隧道显微镜研究CsV3Sb5在不同温度和Ti掺杂下的电子结构，通过Ginzburg-Landau分析揭示两种向列序参数之间的相互关系。
AI.result: 发现了两种不同的向列序：一种与CDW相关，另一种表现为V-dx2-y2费米口袋的C2畸变而不破坏平移对称性。后者在高掺杂水平和高温下持续存在，其向列指向与CDW诱导的向列性在不同掺杂水平下取向不同，最终在原始化合物中与强向列CDW序对齐。
AI.conclusion: 两种向列序分别对应于kagome晶格的不同轨道，它们共存并耦合产生不寻常的关联现象，为理解该家族材料中神秘的相互交织电子序提供了新视角，并建立了一个罕见的双向列序共存和耦合的材料平台。

title: Experimental measurements and modeling of characteristic time scales in single iron particle ignition
summary: Recyclable metal fuels such as iron are promising carbon-free energy carriers for heat and power. In such systems, particle ignition characteristics strongly affect combustion efficiency and combustor stability, making them critical for burner and reactor design. However, predictive ignition modelling remains limited by the lack of time-resolved data for single-particle solid-phase oxidation and phase transitions. In this work, digital in-line holography combined with ultra-high-speed single-color pyrometry is used to resolve characteristic solid-phase oxidation times of spherical micron-sized iron particles burning in well-defined hot oxidizing environments. Three temperature plateaus are identified, corresponding to FeO melting, the γ-Fe to δ-Fe transition, and Fe melting, from which pre-melting oxidation times and melting durations are extracted. An ignition model based on solid-phase iron oxidation kinetics following a parabolic rate law, coupled with external-oxygen-transport-limited description, is used to simulate these characteristic times. The model accurately captures the FeO-scale pre-melting oxidation time, which is nearly independent of oxygen concentration, while the FeO, γ-Fe to δ-Fe, and Fe melting stages show strong oxygen-concentration dependence consistent with external-oxygen-transport-limited reaction rates. These measurements and simulations provide the first diameter-resolved dataset for FeO and Fe melting processes and show that this modelling framework can quantitatively predict characteristic times for single iron particles in metal-fuel applications.

AI.tldr: 使用数字全息术和超高速单色高温计测量微米级铁颗粒在氧化环境中的固相氧化特性，识别三个温度平台并建立点火模型
AI.motivation: 铁等可回收金属燃料是零碳能源载体，但颗粒点火特性对燃烧效率和反应器设计至关重要，目前缺乏单颗粒固相氧化和相变的时间分辨数据限制了预测建模
AI.method: 结合数字同轴全息术和超高速单色高温计，在明确定义的热氧化环境中测量球形微米级铁颗粒的燃烧特性，识别三个温度平台并建立基于抛物线速率定律的固相铁氧化动力学模型
AI.result: 识别出FeO熔化、γ-Fe到δ-Fe转变和Fe熔化三个温度平台，提取了预熔化氧化时间和熔化持续时间，模型准确捕捉了几乎与氧浓度无关的FeO尺度预熔化氧化时间，而其他阶段显示与外部氧传输限制反应速率一致的强氧浓度依赖性
AI.conclusion: 首次提供了FeO和Fe熔化过程的直径分辨数据集，证明该建模框架能够定量预测金属燃料应用中单铁颗粒的特征时间

title: From Ferrimagnetic Insulator to superconducting Luther-Emery Liquid: A DMRG Study of the Two-Leg Lieb Lattice
summary: Motivated by recent experiments on ultracold fermionic spin-1/2 $^6$Li atoms in a Lieb lattice at various Hubbard repulsion $U$ and filling fractions $n$ (Lebrat et al., arXiv:2404.17555), we conduct a density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) analysis of the Hubbard model on a two-leg Lieb ladder. At half-filling, we find a ferrimagnetic Mott insulating ground state, consistent with Lieb's theorem. Away from half-filling, a state with finite total spin $\vec{S}^2 \neq 0$ and vanishing charge gap persists down to filling $n_c \approx 2/3$. For lower, incommensurate fillings, the system is described by a Luttinger liquid with one charge and one spin mode. Intriguingly, in a narrow window near $n_c = 2/3$, close to the onset of ferromagnetic order, we identify a superconducting Luther-Emery phase with dominant $s_{xy}$-wave pairing.

AI.tldr: 在Lieb梯子的Hubbard模型中，通过DMRG研究发现：半填充时为铁磁Mott绝缘体；2/3填充附近出现有限自旋态；更低填充时为Luttinger液体；在2/3填充附近窄窗口内发现s_xy波超导相。
AI.motivation: 受近期超冷费米子自旋-1/2锂原子在Lieb晶格中不同Hubbard排斥U和填充分数n实验的启发，研究Lieb梯子Hubbard模型的基态性质。
AI.method: 使用密度矩阵重整化群（DMRG）方法分析两腿Lieb梯子的Hubbard模型。
AI.result: 半填充时发现铁磁Mott绝缘基态；偏离半填充时，在填充nc≈2/3以下存在有限总自旋且电荷间隙消失的状态；更低填充时为具有一个电荷模和一个自旋模的Luttinger液体；在nc=2/3附近的窄窗口内识别出具有主导s_xy波配对的超导Luther-Emery相。
AI.conclusion: Lieb梯子Hubbard模型展现出丰富的相图，包括铁磁Mott绝缘体、有限自旋态、Luttinger液体，以及在铁磁序起始附近出现的s_xy波超导相。

title: CVT Archives and Chemical Embedding Measures for Multi-Objective Quality Diversity in Molecular Design
summary: Nonlinear optical (NLO) materials are essential for photonic technologies, yet discovering optimal NLO molecules requires balancing multiple competing objectives across vast chemical spaces. Previous work showed that Multi-Objective MAP-Elites (MOME) with grid-based archives discovers diverse, high-quality molecules for electro-optic applications. However, uniform grid partitioning wastes archive capacity on chemically infeasible regions while undersampling high-density areas. We apply MOME with Centroidal Voronoi Tessellation (CVT) archives whose cells are defined by learned embeddings from ChemBERTa-2 Multi-Task Regression reduced via UMAP, capturing chemical similarity beyond simple structural features. We investigate a four-objective NLO molecular design problem: maximizing the $β/ γ$ hyperpolarizability ratio, constraining HOMO-LUMO gap and linear polarizability to target ranges, and minimizing energy per atom. Our results demonstrate that embedding-based measures in CVT archives yield significantly higher median global hypervolume and multi-objective quality diversity scores, while filling nearly all native archive niches.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出使用基于嵌入的质心Voronoi细分（CVT）档案改进多目标MAP-Elites算法，用于非线性光学分子设计，相比均匀网格档案在化学相似性表示和多样性探索方面表现更优。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标MAP-Elites算法使用均匀网格档案存在两个问题：1）在化学不可行区域浪费档案容量；2）在高密度区域采样不足。需要更好的档案划分方法来更有效地探索非线性光学分子的化学空间。
AI.method: 采用基于嵌入的质心Voronoi细分（CVT）档案，使用ChemBERTa-2多任务回归模型学习分子嵌入，通过UMAP降维，构建能捕捉化学相似性的档案单元。应用于四目标非线性光学分子设计问题：最大化β/γ超极化率比，约束HOMO-LUMO能隙和线性极化率在目标范围内，最小化每原子能量。
AI.result: 基于嵌入的CVT档案相比均匀网格档案，在全局超体积中位数和多目标质量多样性得分方面显著更高，同时几乎填满了所有原生档案生态位。
AI.conclusion: 使用学习到的化学嵌入构建CVT档案能够更有效地表示化学相似性，在多目标非线性光学分子设计中实现更好的质量多样性平衡，为复杂化学空间探索提供了改进方法。

title: Information Entropy is a General-Purpose Collective Variable for Enhanced Sampling
summary: Enhanced sampling methods typically require predefined collective variables (CVs) that presuppose knowledge of reaction coordinates, restricting the discovery of unanticipated transition mechanisms or intermediates. Here, we show that a local measure of information entropy in atomistic systems is a general-purpose CV for rare event sampling across molecular and condensed-phase systems. The method biases simulations toward entropy-changing configurations following a well-tempered metadynamics approach, thus balancing novelty and thermodynamic accessibility. Blind exploration of potential energy surfaces enables unsupervised discovery of metastable basins and reaction pathways, including competing transition channels inaccessible to conventional order parameters. We demonstrate the generality of the method across five systems spanning conformational sampling, homogeneous nucleation, glass formation, and solid-state phase transformations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于局部信息熵的通用集体变量，用于增强采样方法，无需预知反应坐标即可发现未知的过渡机制和中间态
AI.motivation: 传统增强采样方法需要预定义集体变量，这限制了发现未预期的过渡机制或中间态的能力。需要一种通用集体变量来克服这一限制。
AI.method: 使用原子系统中的局部信息熵作为通用集体变量，结合well-tempered metadynamics方法，偏向熵变化构型，平衡新颖性和热力学可及性
AI.result: 该方法能够无监督地发现亚稳态盆地和反应路径，包括传统序参数无法访问的竞争过渡通道，在构象采样、均相成核、玻璃形成和固态相变等五个系统中验证了通用性
AI.conclusion: 局部信息熵是一种有效的通用集体变量，能够实现势能面的盲探索，发现传统方法无法访问的过渡机制，具有广泛的适用性

title: Emergent symmetry and thermodynamic crossovers for supercritical AdS black holes
summary: Ising symmetry typically emerges in the critical domain between liquid-gas phases. Universality of this property imposes strong constraints on the behavior of thermodynamic crossovers for supercritical fluids. In this work, we develop a novel approach to investigate the crossover lines for supercritical AdS black holes using Lee-Yang phase transition theory. We analytically continue Lee-Yang zeros into the complex plane within the supercritical region by keeping a modular pressure real. Consequently, we obtain a pair of complex crossover lines, which exhibit universal scalings and manifest the emergent Ising symmetry in the complex phase space. The real crossover lines are defined by projecting the complex crossovers onto the real phase space. As a result, the phase diagram above the critical point is divided into three distinct regimes: liquid-like, indistinguishable and gas-like states, in sharp contrast to scenarios featuring only a single crossover line.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Lee-Yang相变理论的新方法，研究超临界AdS黑洞的交叉线，通过解析延拓获得复交叉线，揭示了复杂相空间中涌现的Ising对称性。
AI.motivation: Ising对称性通常在液-气相临界域中涌现，这种普遍性对超临界流体的热力学交叉行为施加了强约束。作者旨在开发新方法来研究超临界AdS黑洞的交叉线。
AI.method: 采用Lee-Yang相变理论，通过保持模压力为实数，将Lee-Yang零点解析延拓到超临界区域的复平面中，获得一对复交叉线，然后将复交叉线投影到实相空间定义实交叉线。
AI.result: 获得了一对表现出普遍标度行为的复交叉线，在复杂相空间中显现了涌现的Ising对称性。实交叉线将临界点以上的相图划分为三个不同区域：类液态、不可区分态和类气态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了超临界AdS黑洞相图中存在三条交叉线而非单一线，为理解超临界区域的热力学行为提供了新视角，并展示了Ising对称性在复杂相空间中的涌现。

title: Edge universality in Floquet sideband spectra
summary: We show that, for non-interacting fermions under a monochromatic phase drive (Tien--Gordon regime), the outgoing sideband occupations at a sharp Fermi edge are governed by the discrete Bessel kernel -- an exact result at any drive amplitude~$A$. In the large-amplitude regime the edge of this kernel converges, on the $A^{1/3}$ scale, to the Airy kernel of random matrix theory. This universality has a direct transport consequence: the deficit of the photo-assisted shot-noise slope from its high-bias plateau collapses onto the Airy-kernel diagonal. The derivation rests on a bridge between the linear detection chain and the Floquet scattering matrix: commensurate gating isolates a single coherence-order block of the one-body correlator. We identify the crossover temperature below which the Airy scaling is sharp, extend the analysis to biased two-terminal occupations, and argue that multi-tone drives make Pearcey-kernel cusps accessible in Floquet--Sambe space.

AI.tldr: 非相互作用费米子在单色相位驱动下，出射边带占据由离散贝塞尔核精确描述，大振幅时收敛于随机矩阵理论的Airy核，具有直接输运后果。
AI.motivation: 研究周期性驱动下费米子系统边带占据的精确描述，探索大振幅极限下的普适性行为及其对输运性质的影响。
AI.method: 利用线性探测链与Floquet散射矩阵的桥梁，通过可通约门控隔离单粒子关联函数的相干序块，分析离散贝塞尔核在大振幅极限下的标度行为。
AI.result: 发现边带占据由离散贝塞尔核精确描述，大振幅时在A^{1/3}标度下收敛于Airy核；光辅助散粒噪声斜率偏离高偏压平台的行为坍缩到Airy核对角线上；确定了Airy标度保持尖锐的交叉温度。
AI.conclusion: 周期性驱动费米子系统在Tien-Gordon机制下展现出精确可解的边带占据行为，大振幅极限下呈现随机矩阵理论的普适性，为多频驱动下探索Pearcey核尖点提供了可能。

title: Tunable superconductivity and spin density wave in La3Ni2O7/LaAlO3 thin films
summary: Recently, La3Ni2O7 thin film on the LaAlO3 substrate is shown to be superconducting, while the bulk La3Ni2O7 with the same in-plane lattice constant under pressure does not superconduct. This difference suggests the interlayer distance $d_{\rm Ni-Ni}$ is crucial to control superconductivity, and its variation under pressure may tune the ground state sensitively. We investigate systematically the La3Ni2O7/LaAlO3 thin films in a reasonable range of $d_{\rm Ni-Ni}$, by a combination of the first-principle calculations and the singular-mode functional renormalization group. For smaller (larger) $d_{\rm Ni-Ni}$, the ground state is a C-type (G-type) spin density wave with spins coupled ferromagnetically (antiferromagnetically) across the two layers. Between the two phases, $s_\pm$-wave superconductivity emerges with dominant pairings between nickel $3d_{3z^2-r^2}$ orbitals. The results explain the experimental superconductivity in the thin film under ambient pressure, and predict that the applied pressure will decrease the superconducting transition temperature, until the system enters the C-type spin density wave. Experimental verification would provide profound insights into the nature of electron correlations in this system, since the C-type spin density wave is achieved most naturally in the itinerant picture, while it would be hard in the local moment picture where spins are always coupled antiferromagnetically across the layers.

AI.tldr: La3Ni2O7薄膜在LaAlO3衬底上表现出超导性，而相同面内晶格常数的块体材料在压力下不超导。研究发现Ni-Ni层间距离是控制超导的关键参数，通过第一性原理计算和奇异模式函数重整化群方法，揭示了不同层间距离下的相变：较小距离对应C型自旋密度波，较大距离对应G型自旋密度波，中间区域出现s±波超导。
AI.motivation: 解释La3Ni2O7薄膜在LaAlO3衬底上具有超导性而块体材料在压力下不超导的实验现象，探究Ni-Ni层间距离对超导性的关键调控作用，理解该体系中电子关联效应的本质。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算结合奇异模式函数重整化群方法，系统研究La3Ni2O7/LaAlO3薄膜在不同Ni-Ni层间距离下的电子结构和相变行为。
AI.result: 发现Ni-Ni层间距离控制着体系的基态：较小距离时形成C型自旋密度波（层间铁磁耦合），较大距离时形成G型自旋密度波（层间反铁磁耦合），中间区域出现s±波超导，配对主要来自镍3d_{3z^2-r^2}轨道。预测施加压力会降低超导转变温度直至进入C型自旋密度波相。
AI.conclusion: 该研究解释了薄膜材料在常压下的超导现象，预测了压力对超导的抑制效应，并指出C型自旋密度波的存在为理解该体系的电子关联本质提供了重要线索——它更符合巡游电子图像而非局域磁矩图像。

title: Zr Concentration-Dependent Sub-Lattice Phase-Field Model of Hf1-xZrxO2: Analysis of Phase Composition and Polarization Switching
summary: We develop a sub-lattice phase-field model of Hf1-xZrxO2 incorporating zirconium (Zr) concentration (x)-dependence. Our framework expands the time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau (TDGL) equation to the sub-lattice level and incorporates x-dependent interaction parameters and gradient coefficients. Our experimentally calibrated model captures the evolution of charge-voltage (Q-V) characteristics for x ranging from 0.5 to 1.0. The sub-lattice formulation explains the thermodynamic preference and kinetic transition barriers of competing orthorhombic phase (o-phase) and tetragonal phase (t-phase), while the phase-field framework enables spatially resolved analysis of polarization (P) and electric-field (E-field) profiles, allowing multi-domain (MD) polarization and mixed-phase states to emerge naturally. Our model reproduces the experimentally observed ferroelectric (FE)-to-anti-ferroelectric (AFE) transition as x increases from 0.5 to 1.0. At low Zr concentration (x = 0.5-0.6), the o-phase dominates, yielding distinct FE behavior. At high concentration (x = 0.9-1.0), the t-phase is stabilized, leading to AFE transitions. A key finding of our work is the unique behavior at intermediate Zr concentrations (x = 0.7-0.8). Here, the o- and t-phase energies are comparable, making the system strongly influenced by local variations in the electric field (E-field), which arise from stray fields near the domain walls. This non-uniform field distribution results in a mixed-phase composition and spatially staggered polarization reversal, which manifests as a more gradual Q-V evolution compared to other values of x. By linking energy landscapes to spatial field effects, the model provides insights into the FE-to-AFE crossover in Hf1-xZrxO2.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个包含锆浓度依赖性的Hf1-xZrxO2亚晶格相场模型，成功模拟了从铁电到反铁电的相变过程，并揭示了中间浓度下混合相和空间交错极化的独特行为。
AI.motivation: 研究Hf1-xZrxO2材料中铁电到反铁电的相变机制，理解锆浓度变化对相稳定性和极化行为的影响，特别是中间浓度区域的独特物理现象。
AI.method: 开发了包含锆浓度依赖性的亚晶格相场模型，扩展了时间依赖的Ginzburg-Landau方程到亚晶格层面，结合实验校准的参数和梯度系数，进行空间分辨的极化和电场分析。
AI.result: 模型成功再现了实验观察到的铁电到反铁电相变：低锆浓度时正交相主导的铁电行为，高浓度时四方相稳定的反铁电行为，中间浓度区域出现混合相和空间交错极化反转。
AI.conclusion: 该亚晶格相场模型通过连接能量景观和空间场效应，为理解Hf1-xZrxO2中铁电到反铁电的交叉转变提供了新见解，特别揭示了中间浓度区域由局域电场变化驱动的独特混合相行为。

title: Decoding Equilibrium and Dynamical Criticality in the 2D Topological Order
summary: Unifying equilibrium criticality and dynamical quantum phase transitions (DQPTs) under complex driving fields remains a profound challenge. Here, we decode this connection in the 2D strongly interacting Wen-plaquette model. By mapping its anyonic excitations to 1D effective dissipative channels, we reveal that microscopic single-particle fidelity zeros exactly reconstruct the macroscopic equilibrium topological phase boundaries. Beyond equilibrium, we demonstrate that during non-unitary quench dynamics, these very same static singularities enforce an absolute momentum-space exclusion against dynamical Fisher zeros. Furthermore, a newly identified dissipation-phase racing mechanism prematurely depletes the decaying mode, fundamentally annihilating DQPTs and generating topologically trivial steady states. Our results establish exact microscopic static singularities as the universal decoder for macroscopic non-unitary topological dynamics.

AI.tldr: 通过将二维Wen-plaquette模型的任意子激发映射到一维有效耗散通道，揭示了微观单粒子保真度零点精确重构宏观平衡拓扑相边界，并发现静态奇点强制动量空间排斥，耗散-相位竞争机制提前耗尽衰减模式，消除动力学量子相变
AI.motivation: 统一平衡临界性和复杂驱动场下的动力学量子相变是一个深刻挑战，需要在强相互作用系统中解码这种联系
AI.method: 研究二维强相互作用Wen-plaquette模型，将其任意子激发映射到一维有效耗散通道，分析微观单粒子保真度零点与宏观平衡拓扑相边界的关系，研究非幺正淬火动力学中的静态奇点效应
AI.result: 微观静态奇点精确重构宏观平衡拓扑相边界；在非幺正淬火动力学中，相同静态奇点强制动量空间排斥，阻止动力学Fisher零点；耗散-相位竞争机制提前耗尽衰减模式，消除动力学量子相变，产生拓扑平凡稳态
AI.conclusion: 精确的微观静态奇点是宏观非幺正拓扑动力学的通用解码器，建立了平衡临界性与动力学量子相变之间的统一联系

title: Efficient High-order Mass-conserving and Energy-balancing Schemes for Schrödinger-Poisson Equations
summary: We study relaxation-based approaches for conserving mass and energy in the numerical solution of Schrödinger-Poisson (SP) type systems. Relaxation-based methods offer a general approach that can be applied as post-time step processing to achieve conservation with any time-stepping scheme. Here we study two types of relaxation techniques applied to implicit-explicit Runge-Kutta schemes, with Fourier collocation in space. We also study SP equations with time-varying coefficients (which appear naturally in cosmology) where energy is not conserved but satisfies a balance equation. We show that the fully-discrete system conserves both mass and energy (or satisfies the balance equation in case of time-varying coefficients), up to rounding errors. The effectiveness of these methods is demonstrated via numerical examples, including a three-dimensional cosmological simulation.

AI.tldr: 研究用于薛定谔-泊松系统数值解中保持质量和能量守恒的松弛方法，包括时间变系数情况，通过隐显式Runge-Kutta格式和傅里叶配置实现完全离散系统的守恒性
AI.motivation: 薛定谔-泊松系统在量子力学和宇宙学中很重要，但数值求解时难以同时保持质量和能量守恒。传统方法有限制，需要一种通用方法能在任何时间步进方案后处理实现守恒
AI.method: 采用松弛方法作为后时间步处理，结合隐显式Runge-Kutta时间离散和空间傅里叶配置。研究两种松弛技术，并扩展到时间变系数系统（如宇宙学应用）
AI.result: 完全离散系统在舍入误差范围内保持质量和能量守恒（时间变系数情况下满足平衡方程）。数值实验验证了有效性，包括三维宇宙学模拟
AI.conclusion: 松弛方法为薛定谔-泊松系统提供了一种通用且有效的守恒保持技术，适用于标准和时间变系数情况，在宇宙学等应用中具有实用价值

title: Nonlinear signal enhancement of strongly-coupled molecules in pump-probe experiments
summary: Nonlinear spectroscopy is widely used to study the transient dynamics of molecules under strong light-matter coupling, though it remains unclear to what extent uncoupled intracavity molecules obscure signals from the strongly-coupled species of interest. Pump or probe fields resonant in the strongly-coupled spectral region will preferentially interact with cavity-coupled molecules, but can exhibit severe optical artifacts due to wave interference in the cavity. On the other hand, non-resonant pump or probe fields having wavelengths at which the cavity mirrors are highly transmissive propagate as traveling waves along the cavity axis, interacting with both coupled and uncoupled intracavity molecules. Here, we quantify the contributions of signals from strongly-coupled and uncoupled populations in simulated experiments with different resonant and non-resonant pump-probe configurations. We find that while resonant schemes maximize selectivity for the signals of strongly-coupled molecules, non-resonant schemes retain surprisingly high sensitivity to these signals while remaining less susceptible to optical artifacts.

AI.tldr: 该研究量化了强耦合与未耦合分子在非线性光谱中的贡献，发现共振方案对强耦合分子信号选择性最强，而非共振方案在保持高灵敏度的同时能减少光学伪影。
AI.motivation: 在强光-物质耦合研究中，非线性光谱被广泛用于研究分子的瞬态动力学，但尚不清楚未耦合的腔内分子在多大程度上会掩盖强耦合目标物种的信号。共振泵浦/探测方案会优先与腔耦合分子相互作用，但可能产生严重的光学伪影；而非共振方案则同时与耦合和未耦合分子相互作用，需要量化这两种方案的信号贡献差异。
AI.method: 通过模拟实验，量化不同共振和非共振泵浦-探测配置下强耦合和未耦合分子群体的信号贡献。分析共振方案（在强耦合光谱区域共振）和非共振方案（波长在腔镜高透射区域）的信号特性。
AI.result: 研究发现：共振方案对强耦合分子信号具有最大选择性，但容易产生严重的光学伪影；非共振方案对强耦合分子信号保持出人意料的高灵敏度，同时对光学伪影的敏感性较低。
AI.conclusion: 虽然共振方案在选择性上最优，但非共振方案在保持足够灵敏度的同时具有更好的抗光学伪影能力，为强光-物质耦合研究提供了更稳健的实验方案选择。

title: Quantum state randomization constrained by non-Abelian symmetries
summary: The emergence of randomness from unitary quantum dynamics is a central problem across diverse disciplines, ranging from the foundations of statistical mechanics to quantum algorithms and quantum computation. Physical systems are invariably subject to constraints -- from simple scalar symmetries to more complex non-Abelian ones -- that restrict the accessible regions of Hilbert space and obstruct the generation of pure random states. In this work, we show that for systems with noncommuting symmetries such as SU(2), the degree of Haar-like randomization achievable under unitary dynamics is strongly constrained by experimental limitations on state initialization, in particular low-entanglement initial states, rather than by the symmetry-constrained dynamics themselves. Specifically, we show that time-evolved states can, in principle, reproduce Haar-like behavior at the level of finite statistical moments (i.e., those accessible under realistic experimental conditions with a finite number of state copies) provided that the initial state matches the corresponding moments of the conserved operators in the Haar ensemble. However, for the unentangled initial states commonly used in programmable quantum systems, this condition cannot be satisfied. Consequently, even at asymptotically long times in strongly quantum-chaotic regimes, late-time states remain distinguishable from Haar-random states in probes such as entanglement entropy, with deviations from Haar behavior that remain finite with increasing system size. We quantify the maximal entanglement entropy achievable and identify the unentangled initial conditions that yield the most entropic late-time states. Our results show that the combination of non-Abelian symmetry structure and experimental constraints on state preparation can strongly limit the degree of Haar-like randomization achievable at late times.

AI.tldr: 非阿贝尔对称性（如SU(2)）与低纠缠初始态共同限制了量子系统中Haar随机化的程度，即使长时间演化后，未纠缠初始态仍无法达到完全Haar随机行为。
AI.motivation: 研究量子系统中随机性如何从幺正动力学中涌现，特别关注非交换对称性约束下，实验上可实现的低纠缠初始态如何限制Haar随机化的程度。
AI.method: 分析具有非阿贝尔对称性（如SU(2)）的系统，研究在幺正演化下，初始态与守恒算符的统计矩匹配条件，特别关注未纠缠初始态的情况。
AI.result: 即使长时间演化后，未纠缠初始态仍与Haar随机态可区分，纠缠熵偏差随系统尺寸增大保持有限，量化了可达到的最大纠缠熵并识别了最优初始条件。
AI.conclusion: 非阿贝尔对称结构与实验态制备约束共同限制了系统在长时间演化中达到Haar随机化的程度，这对量子计算和统计力学基础有重要意义。

title: Spin-biased quantum spin Hall effect in altermagnetic Lieb lattice
summary: Altermagnetic (AM) order, a recently discovered magnetic state, has attracted intense research interest for its potential applications in spintronic and quantum technologies. Here, we theoretically investigate the AM state in the Lieb lattice, a prototypical two-dimensional lattice, using the Hubbard model. We show that AM order emerges with only moderate electronic correlations. Strikingly, spin-orbit coupling drives the system into a topological phase exhibiting a new quantum spin Hall effect (QSHE) with spin-biased topological edge states in one-dimensional nanoribbons. These edge states possess different localizations and velocities, and hence may produce spin and charge currents, fundamentally distinct from that in conventional topological insulators with spin degeneracy. This novel spin-biased QSHE in the AM Lieb lattice unveils exciting opportunities for both fundamental studies and innovative device concepts, motivating immediate experimental exploration.

AI.tldr: 在Lieb晶格中，中等电子关联即可产生反铁磁序，自旋轨道耦合驱动系统进入拓扑相，产生具有自旋偏置的新型量子自旋霍尔效应。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁序作为新发现的磁态，在自旋电子学和量子技术中具有应用潜力，研究其在Lieb晶格中的性质有助于探索新的拓扑现象和器件概念。
AI.method: 使用Hubbard模型在二维Lieb晶格中理论研究反铁磁态，分析电子关联和自旋轨道耦合对系统的影响。
AI.result: 中等电子关联即可产生反铁磁序；自旋轨道耦合驱动系统进入拓扑相，产生新型自旋偏置量子自旋霍尔效应；一维纳米带中出现具有不同局域化和速度的自旋偏置拓扑边缘态。
AI.conclusion: 反铁磁Lieb晶格中的新型自旋偏置量子自旋霍尔效应为基础研究和创新器件设计提供了新机遇，值得立即进行实验探索。

title: Band-basis decomposition of superfluid weight in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene: Quantifying geometric and conventional contributions
summary: We decompose the superfluid weight D_s of magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene (MATBG) into conventional (band-velocity) and geometric (interband-coherence) contributions using a band-basis current operator splitting applied to the Bistritzer-MacDonald continuum model. In the flat-band subspace, quantum geometry accounts for 22-26% of D_s at charge neutrality depending on pairing symmetry, with cross terms vanishing to machine precision. Including remote bands raises the geometric fraction to ~55-58%, while D_s^conv converges to within 2% -- demonstrating that remote bands contribute exclusively through interband coherence. The geometric fraction peaks at ~27-33% near the nu = +/- 2 fillings where superconductivity is strongest, and is insensitive to gap magnitude in the experimentally relevant range.

AI.tldr: 通过能带基电流算符分解，分析了魔角双层石墨烯超流重量的常规和几何贡献，发现量子几何在电荷中性点贡献22-26%，考虑远带后几何贡献升至55-58%。
AI.motivation: 研究魔角双层石墨烯中超流重量的来源，特别是量子几何效应对超导性质的影响，理解超流重量中常规能带速度贡献和几何贡献的相对重要性。
AI.method: 使用能带基电流算符分解方法，应用于Bistritzer-MacDonald连续模型，将超流重量分解为常规（能带速度）和几何（带间相干）贡献，分析平带子空间和包含远带的情况。
AI.result: 在平带子空间中，量子几何贡献超流重量的22-26%（取决于配对对称性）；包含远带后几何贡献升至55-58%，而常规贡献收敛到2%以内；在超导最强的填充ν=±2附近，几何贡献达到峰值27-33%；几何贡献在实验相关能隙范围内不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 魔角双层石墨烯的超流重量有显著的几何贡献，远带主要通过带间相干贡献，几何贡献在超导最强的填充附近达到峰值，表明量子几何在MATBG超导中起重要作用。

title: Understanding insulating ferromagnetism in LaCoO3 films under tensile strain
summary: LaCoO3 thin films grown under epitaxial tensile strain exhibit a robust ferromagnetic insulating state that is absent in the bulk. Despite many studies, both experimental and computational, the microscopic origin of this phenomenon is not well understood. In this work, density functional theory calculations are used to systematically investigate the magnetic ground state of stoichiometric LaCoO3 under epitaxial strain equivalent to that imposed by a SrTiO3 substrate. The results identify a ferromagnetic insulating ground state characterized by a unique ordered array of high-spin (HS) and low-spin (LS) Co3+ ions. The spin state ordering is best described as 2 x 2 columns that consist of alternating HS and LS Co3+ ions, separated by planes of LS Co3+ ions. This leads to HS-LS-LS repeating sequence of Co3+ ions in both pseudocubic [100] and [010] directions. Analysis of the electronic structure confirms the presence of an insulating gap. Evaluation of the superexchange interactions reveal ferromagnetic interactions between HS Co3+ ions via 90 degree paths, and antiferromagnetic interactions via 180 degree paths, both of which are facilitated by empty sigma* (eg) orbitals on the diamagnetic LS Co3+ ions. The strength and number of 90 degree ferromagnetic interactions are sufficient to overcome the competing 180 degree antiferromagnetic interactions stabilizing a ferromagnetic insulating state.

AI.tldr: LaCoO3薄膜在拉伸应变下出现铁磁绝缘态，源于高自旋和低自旋Co3+离子的有序排列，形成独特的2×2柱状结构，其中90度铁磁相互作用克服了180度反铁磁相互作用。
AI.motivation: 体相LaCoO3不具有铁磁绝缘态，但在外延拉伸应变下的薄膜中却出现这种状态，其微观起源尚未被充分理解。本研究旨在通过计算揭示这一现象的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，系统研究在SrTiO3衬底等效外延应变下，化学计量比LaCoO3的磁性基态。
AI.result: 发现了铁磁绝缘基态，其特征是高自旋(HS)和低自旋(LS)Co3+离子的有序排列，形成2×2柱状结构，HS和LS交替排列。电子结构分析确认存在绝缘带隙，超交换相互作用分析显示90度路径产生铁磁相互作用，180度路径产生反铁磁相互作用。
AI.conclusion: LaCoO3薄膜中铁磁绝缘态的微观起源是HS和LS Co3+离子的有序排列，其中90度铁磁相互作用的强度和数量足以克服180度反铁磁相互作用，从而稳定了铁磁绝缘态。

title: H-NESSi: The Hierarchical Non-Equilibrium Systems Simulation package
summary: We present H-NESSi (The Hierarchical Non-Equilibrium Systems Simulation package), an open-source software package for solving the Kadanoff-Baym equations (KBE) of nonequilibrium Green's function (NEGF) theory using hierarchical low-rank compression techniques. The simulation of strongly correlated quantum systems out of equilibrium is severely limited by the cubic scaling in propagation time and quadratic memory growth associated with conventional two-time formulations. H-NESSi overcomes these limitations by combining high-order time-stepping schemes with hierarchical off-diagonal low-rank (HODLR) representations of the retarded and lesser Green's functions, enabling controllable accuracy at substantially reduced computational cost and memory usage. Imaginary time quantities are efficiently represented using the discrete Lehmann representation (DLR), allowing compact and accurate treatment of thermal initial states. The implementation supports multiorbital systems, adaptive singular value truncation, and both shared-memory (OpenMP) and distributed-memory (MPI) parallelization strategies suitable for large-scale lattice calculations. The workflow closely mirrors established NEGF frameworks while introducing compression transparently into the propagation procedure. Benchmark applications to driven superconductors within dynamical mean-field theory and to the two-dimensional Hubbard model demonstrate favorable scaling compared to conventional implementations, with asymptotic time complexity significantly below the cubic scaling of uncompressed approaches. H-NESSi thus enables long-time and large-system nonequilibrium simulations of correlated quantum materials which were previously computationally prohibitive.

AI.tldr: H-NESSi是一个开源软件包，使用分层低秩压缩技术求解非平衡格林函数理论的Kadanoff-Baym方程，显著降低了计算成本和内存使用，使之前计算上不可行的长时大规模非平衡模拟成为可能。
AI.motivation: 强关联量子系统的非平衡模拟受到传统双时间公式中传播时间立方缩放和内存二次增长的严重限制，需要开发能够克服这些限制的新计算方法。
AI.method: 结合高阶时间步进方案与延迟和较小格林函数的分层非对角低秩表示，使用离散Lehmann表示高效处理虚时间量，支持多轨道系统、自适应奇异值截断以及OpenMP和MPI并行化。
AI.result: 在驱动超导体动态平均场理论和二维Hubbard模型的基准应用中，相比传统实现显示出有利的缩放特性，渐近时间复杂度显著低于未压缩方法的立方缩放。
AI.conclusion: H-NESSi通过分层低秩压缩技术实现了计算效率和内存使用的大幅提升，使得之前计算上不可行的长时大规模强关联量子材料非平衡模拟成为可能。

title: A deep learning framework for jointly solving transient Fokker-Planck equations with arbitrary parameters and initial distributions
summary: Efficiently solving the Fokker-Planck equation (FPE) is central to analyzing complex parameterized stochastic systems. However, current numerical methods lack parallel computation capabilities across varying conditions, severely limiting comprehensive parameter exploration and transient analysis. This paper introduces a deep learning-based pseudo-analytical probability solution (PAPS) that, via a single training process, simultaneously resolves transient FPE solutions for arbitrary multi-modal initial distributions, system parameters, and time points. The core idea is to unify initial, transient, and stationary distributions via Gaussian mixture distributions (GMDs) and develop a constraint-preserving autoencoder that bijectively maps constrained GMD parameters to unconstrained, low-dimensional latent representations. In this representation space, the panoramic transient dynamics across varying initial conditions and system parameters can be modeled by a single evolution network. Extensive experiments on paradigmatic systems demonstrate that the proposed PAPS maintains high accuracy while achieving inference speeds four orders of magnitude faster than GPU-accelerated Monte Carlo simulations. This efficiency leap enables previously intractable real-time parameter sweeps and systematic investigations of stochastic bifurcations. By decoupling representation learning from physics-informed transient dynamics, our work establishes a scalable paradigm for probabilistic modeling of multi-dimensional, parameterized stochastic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度学习的伪解析概率解法(PAPS)，通过单次训练同时求解任意多模态初始分布、系统参数和时间点的瞬态FPE解，实现比GPU加速蒙特卡洛模拟快4个数量级的推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有数值方法缺乏并行计算能力，限制了参数探索和瞬态分析。需要一种能同时处理不同初始条件、系统参数和时间点的高效FPE求解方法。
AI.method: 通过高斯混合分布统一初始、瞬态和稳态分布，构建约束保持自编码器将约束的GMD参数双射映射到无约束低维潜在表示，在该表示空间中用单一演化网络建模全景瞬态动力学。
AI.result: 在典型系统上的实验表明，PAPS保持高精度的同时，推理速度比GPU加速蒙特卡洛模拟快4个数量级，实现了实时参数扫描和随机分岔的系统研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过将表示学习与物理信息瞬态动力学解耦，为多维参数化随机系统的概率建模建立了可扩展范式。

title: Two-colour coherent control of nuclear and electron dynamics in photoionization of molecular hydrogen with FEL pulses
summary: The extension of coherent $ω$-$2ω$ control schemes, recently implemented in free-electron lasers (FELs), to molecular systems offers new opportunities to control chemical dynamics on the electronic timescale, potentially allowing for the steering of reactions along previously inaccessible pathways. We have implemented such a scheme at the seeded FERMI FEL to retrieve the relative phases between one-photon (frequency $2ω$) and two-photon (frequency $ω$) ionization paths in the hydrogen molecule as a function of photoelectron energy and emission angle. The narrow bandwidth of the XUV pulses enables selective excitation of vibrational levels of neutral intermediate H$_2$ states in the two-photon ionization path. Here we focus on $ω$--$2ω$ ionization of H$_2(X\,^{1}Σ_g^{+},\,v=0)$ into the H$_2^{+}(X\,^{2}Σ_g^{+},\,v_f)$ ground state involving the H$_2(B\,^{1}Σ_u^{+},\,v'=6)$ intermediate state. The relative phases of the $ω$ and $2ω$ interfering photoionization amplitudes exhibit a strong dependence on photoelectron energy, i.e.\ on the final vibrational state $v_f$ in the H$_2^{+}$ cation. With the help of accurate theoretical calculations, the observed phase jumps are assigned to the coupled electronic and nuclear dynamics at play in the two-photon process, significantly influenced by H$_2(^{1}Σ_g^{+}$ and $^{1}Π_g)$ autoionizing states and the mapping of the H$_2(B\,^{1}Σ_u^{+},\,v'=6)$ intermediate-state nuclear wavefunction into the final vibrational states of H$_2^{+}(X\,^{2}Σ_g^{+})$. The present work establishes the fundamental concepts required to access coupled electron--nuclear dynamics in molecules using $ω$--$2ω$ coherent control schemes currently available at free-electron laser facilities.

AI.tldr: 在FEL上实现ω-2ω相干控制方案，测量H₂分子中单光子和双光子电离路径的相对相位，揭示电子-核耦合动力学
AI.motivation: 将自由电子激光器中的相干ω-2ω控制方案扩展到分子系统，为在电子时间尺度上控制化学动力学提供新机会，可能引导反应沿先前无法访问的路径进行
AI.method: 在种子型FERMI FEL上实施ω-2ω方案，测量氢分子中单光子(2ω)和双光子(ω)电离路径的相对相位随光电子能量和发射角的变化，利用窄带宽XUV脉冲选择性激发双光子电离路径中的中性中间态振动能级
AI.result: ω和2ω干涉光电离振幅的相对相位对光电子能量（即H₂⁺阳离子的最终振动态vf）有强烈依赖性，观察到的相位跃变归因于双光子过程中电子和核动力学的耦合，受H₂自电离态和中间态核波函数映射的显著影响
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了在自由电子激光器设施中使用ω-2ω相干控制方案访问分子中电子-核耦合动力学的基本概念

title: Lattice Field Theory for a network of real neurons
comment: Presented at the 42nd International Symposium on Lattice Field Theory (LATTICE2025), 2-8 November 2025, Tata Institute of Fundamental Research, Mumbai, India. Parallel Session Theoretical developments and applications beyond Standard Model. 10 pages
summary: In a recent paper [Bardella et al., Entropy 26 (6), 495 (2024)] we introduced a simplified Lattice Field Theory (LFT) framework that allows experimental recordings from major Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) to be interpreted in a simple and physically grounded way. From a neuroscience point of view, our method modifies the Maximum Entropy model for neural networks so that also the time evolution of the system is taken into account and it can be interpreted as another version of the Free Energy principle (FEP). This framework is naturally tailored to interpret recordings from chronic multi-site BCIs, especially spike rasters from measurements of single neuron activity.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个简化的晶格场论框架，用于解释脑机接口记录数据，将最大熵模型扩展到时间演化，并与自由能原理相联系。
AI.motivation: 需要一种简单且物理基础的方法来解释主要脑机接口的实验记录，特别是慢性多部位BCI的单神经元活动测量数据。
AI.method: 修改神经网络的最大熵模型，使其考虑系统的时间演化，构建简化的晶格场论框架，可解释为自由能原理的另一种版本。
AI.result: 开发了一个专门用于解释慢性多部位脑机接口记录（特别是单神经元活动的尖峰栅格数据）的自然框架。
AI.conclusion: 该简化LFT框架为脑机接口记录提供了简单且物理基础的解释方法，将最大熵模型扩展到时间维度，并与自由能原理建立了联系。

title: Orbital-driven emergent transport in altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets have recently emerged as a promising platform for spintronics due to their unique magnetic symmetry. However, most studies have focused on spin degrees of freedom, leaving the dynamic role of orbital degrees of freedom largely unexplored. In this work, we extend the altermagnet Hamiltonian to include the orbital degree of freedom as a dynamical variable and derive the resulting emergent electromagnetic fields (EEMFs). This approach allows us to demonstrate emergent electric fields controllable via lattice anisotropy and the resulting orbital and magnetic multipole currents. Furthermore, we show that non-vanishing emergent electric fields can arise even in simplified spin and orbital textures, particularly in the presence of dynamic lattice distortion. This formalism is generalizable to high-order altermagnets beyond d-wave systems.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了交变磁体哈密顿量以包含轨道自由度作为动力学变量，推导出由此产生的涌现电磁场，展示了可通过晶格各向异性控制的涌现电场及其产生的轨道和磁多极子电流。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体因其独特的磁对称性在自旋电子学中具有应用前景，但现有研究主要关注自旋自由度，轨道自由度的动力学作用尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 将轨道自由度作为动力学变量纳入交变磁体哈密顿量，推导由此产生的涌现电磁场，分析晶格各向异性对涌现电场的控制作用，并研究简化自旋和轨道纹理中的动态晶格畸变效应。
AI.result: 发现可通过晶格各向异性控制涌现电场，并产生轨道和磁多极子电流；即使在简化的自旋和轨道纹理中，动态晶格畸变也能产生非零的涌现电场；该形式可推广到超越d波系统的高阶交变磁体。
AI.conclusion: 将轨道自由度纳入交变磁体动力学研究揭示了新的涌现电磁现象，为交变磁体在自旋电子学中的应用提供了新的物理机制和控制手段，且该理论框架具有普适性。

title: Numerically Exact Study of Flat-Band Superconductivity
summary: Current theories of high-temperature superconductivity in flat-band systems predict a linear dependence of the transition temperature on the attractive interaction, $T_c(U) = c|U|$. However, neither the value of $c$ nor the full nonlinear $T_c(U)$ curve -- with a maximum at large $|U|$ -- is known beyond mean-field and quantum geometry estimates. Using a controlled diagrammatic Monte Carlo technique, we trace the onset of superfluid response in the Lieb lattice with attractive Hubbard interaction. Focusing on the half-filled flat-band case, where the ordering mechanism differs fundamentally from both BCS and preformed Cooper pair scenarios, we find that the pairing response diverges linearly with decreasing temperature over a broad range of $U$, leading to a sharp crossover to long-range correlations at a characteristic temperature $T_*$, which provides a controlled upper bound on $T_c$. The highest $T_*$ occurs when all three bands touch at a single momentum point, potentially corresponding to high $T_c$ values.

AI.tldr: 通过受控的图蒙特卡洛方法研究Lieb晶格中平带半填充情况下的超导转变温度Tc与吸引相互作用U的关系，发现配对响应随温度降低线性发散，存在特征温度T*作为Tc的上界。
AI.motivation: 当前平带系统高温超导理论预测Tc与吸引相互作用U呈线性关系，但除了平均场和量子几何估计外，c值和完整的非线性Tc(U)曲线（在大|U|处有最大值）尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用受控的图蒙特卡洛技术，研究具有吸引Hubbard相互作用的Lieb晶格中的超流响应起始。重点关注半填充平带情况，该情况下的有序机制与BCS和预形成Cooper对方案有根本不同。
AI.result: 发现在广泛的U范围内，配对响应随温度降低线性发散，导致在特征温度T*处出现向长程关联的急剧交叉，T*为Tc提供了受控上界。当所有三个带在单个动量点接触时，T*达到最高值，可能对应高Tc值。
AI.conclusion: 通过受控计算揭示了平带系统中超导转变温度与相互作用强度的非线性关系，为理解平带高温超导机制提供了新的定量见解，特别是特征温度T*作为Tc上界的发现具有重要意义。

title: Many-body description of two-dimensional van der Waals ferroelectric $α-$In$_2$Se$_3$
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures, Invited article APL Comput. Phys. (in press)
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals ferroelectrics are recognized for enabling many applications, from memory and logic to neuromorphic computing, as well as transforming other materials to control electronic phase transitions and topological states. While these materials are typically weakly correlated and expected to have their ground-state properties well described with the commonly used density functional theory, by focusing on bilayers and trilayers of In$_2$Se$_3$ we show that this approach may not be reliable. The underlying electronic structure strongly depends on the polarization structure of the multilayer system and is surprisingly challenging to accurately calculate, requiring a high-fidelity many-body theory of the quasiparticle self-consistent \textit{GW} approximation. We develop this underlying description by extending the capabilities of Green function implementation within the open-source Questaal package. We show that even a sophisticated hybrid functional approach may fail to predict a nonvanishing gap in a bilayer In$_2$Se$_3$ and yields charge density, polarization, and band offsets that strongly deviate from the many-body picture. We discuss the implications of these computational advances for future opportunities in 2D ferroelectrics.

AI.tldr: 二维范德华铁电材料In2Se3的多层结构电子性质计算需要高精度多体GW理论，传统DFT和杂化泛函方法不可靠
AI.motivation: 二维范德华铁电材料在存储、逻辑、神经形态计算等领域有重要应用，但传统密度泛函理论(DFT)对这些材料的电子结构计算可能不可靠，需要更精确的理论方法
AI.method: 扩展开源Questaal软件包中的格林函数实现，采用准粒子自洽GW近似(QSGW)这一高保真多体理论，研究In2Se3双层和三层结构的电子性质
AI.result: 发现即使是复杂的杂化泛函方法也可能无法预测In2Se3双层的非零带隙，其电荷密度、极化和带偏移与多体理论结果存在显著偏差
AI.conclusion: 二维铁电材料的电子结构计算需要高精度多体理论方法，传统DFT方法不可靠，这些计算进展为二维铁电材料的未来研究提供了新机遇

title: Three-dimensional zigzag correlations in the van der Waals Kitaev magnet RuBr$_3$
summary: Ruthenium trihalides Ru$X_3$ ($X$ = Cl, Br, I) provide a tunable platform for Kitaev magnetism in two-dimensional van der Waals materials. Despite their similar crystal structures and zigzag antiferromagnetic order, RuBr$_3$ exhibits a higher Néel temperature ($T_N$) than RuCl$_3$, suggesting their distinct proximity to the Kitaev quantum spin liquid phase. Using Ru $L_3$-edge resonant x-ray scattering, we show that, while the long-range zigzag order in RuBr$_3$ disappears at $T_N$, the zigzag correlations that persist well above $T_N$ show a pronounced spectral weight redistribution along the interlayer direction. These results suggest that the enhanced interlayer magnetic interactions driven by the extended Br 4$p$ orbitals stabilize three-dimensional zigzag correlations in RuBr$_3$.

AI.tldr: RuBr₃比RuCl₃有更高的尼尔温度，这归因于Br 4p轨道增强的层间磁相互作用，稳定了三维zigzag关联
AI.motivation: 研究RuX₃（X=Cl, Br, I）材料中不同卤素对Kitaev磁性和量子自旋液体相接近程度的影响，特别是解释为什么RuBr₃比RuCl₃有更高的尼尔温度
AI.method: 使用Ru L₃边共振X射线散射技术，研究RuBr₃中zigzag磁序的温度依赖性和层间关联特性
AI.result: RuBr₃的长程zigzag序在T_N消失，但zigzag关联在远高于T_N时仍持续存在，并沿层间方向发生显著谱重分布，表明增强的层间磁相互作用稳定了三维zigzag关联
AI.conclusion: Br 4p轨道的扩展特性增强了RuBr₃的层间磁相互作用，这解释了其比RuCl₃更高的尼尔温度，并表明RuBr₃可能更接近Kitaev量子自旋液体相

title: Does the total energy difference method for modelling core level photoemission fail for bigger molecules?
summary: The $Δ$-Self-Consistent-Field ($Δ$SCF) method permits calculations of core electron binding energies in materials and molecules at a modest computational cost. However, it has been reported that whilst this method works well for small molecules, its accuracy drops off dramatically when larger systems are considered. Particularly large errors have been reported for the anthrone molecule, which consists of 25 atoms. In this work, the gas-phase photoelectron spectrum of anthrone is revisited both computationally and experimentally. The measured C 1s binding energies in anthrone differ markedly from previously published values, and the new experimental results are in good agreement with $Δ$SCF calculations based on the SCAN functional. In addition, the performance of the $Δ$SCF method is evaluated for a dataset of 44 core electron binding energies from medium sized molecules containing between 10 and 40 atoms. The mean absolute error for this dataset - 0.19 eV - is comparable to the results of previous computational benchmarks. Overall, these results and general theoretical considerations indicate that the $Δ$SCF method is suitable for modelling localized excitations in both small and large molecules, and applications to other extended systems are also promising.

AI.tldr: ΔSCF方法计算核心电子结合能，在中等大小分子上表现良好，与实验数据一致，适用于局部激发计算
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明ΔSCF方法在小分子中表现良好，但在大分子（如25个原子的蒽酮）中准确性显著下降。本研究重新评估ΔSCF在中等大小分子中的性能，特别是针对蒽酮分子。
AI.method: 结合计算和实验方法：1) 重新测量蒽酮的气相光电子谱；2) 使用基于SCAN泛函的ΔSCF方法计算核心电子结合能；3) 评估ΔSCF在44个中等大小分子（10-40个原子）核心电子结合能数据集上的性能。
AI.result: 1) 测量的蒽酮C 1s结合能与先前发表值显著不同，与基于SCAN泛函的ΔSCF计算结果一致；2) ΔSCF在44个分子数据集上的平均绝对误差为0.19 eV，与先前计算基准结果相当；3) ΔSCF方法适用于小分子和大分子的局部激发建模。
AI.conclusion: ΔSCF方法适用于模拟小分子和大分子的局部激发，在中等大小分子上表现良好（平均绝对误差0.19 eV），对扩展系统的应用也很有前景。先前关于ΔSCF在大分子中准确性下降的报告可能是由于实验数据不准确所致。

title: Accessing the performance of CC2 for excited state dynamics: a benchmark study with pyrazine
comment: Main text: 29 pages, 6 figures; Supporting information: 21 pages, 6 figures
summary: In this work, we access the performance of RI-CC2 for ultrafast internal conversion using pyrazine as a benchmark system. We implement analytical gradients and nonadiabatic coupling vectors for RI-CC2 in the Q-Chem package and employ them in two complementary approaches: a reduced-dimensionality vibronic coupling (VC) model and full-dimensional ab initio on-the-fly trajectory surface hopping simulations. To accelerate the on-the-fly dynamics, we employ a diabatic artificial neural network model trained on RI-CC2 data. Both the VC model and the full-dimensional dynamics reveal that the dark $A_\text{1u}$ state actively participates in the internal conversion process. RI-CC2 identifies the $Q_\text{9a}$ and $Q_\text{8a}$ vibrational modes as key drivers of the coherent population transfer between the $A_\text{1u}$ and $B_\text{3u}$. The on-the-fly dynamics reproduce the experimental $B_\text{2u}$ population decay time of 26 fs, consistent with the measured value of $22\pm3$ fs. The high-quality dataset of energies, forces, and nonadiabatic couplings generated here provides a valuable resource for future machine-learning developments, while the stochastic variant sRI-CC2 promises to extend such dynamics to larger molecular systems.

AI.tldr: 评估RI-CC2方法在吡嗪超快内转换中的性能，通过VC模型和全维动力学模拟揭示暗态A1u参与过程，Q9a和Q8a振动模式驱动相干转移，动力学结果与实验26 fs衰减时间一致
AI.motivation: 评估RI-CC2方法在超快内转换过程中的性能，特别是对于吡嗪这样的基准体系，需要开发高效的计算工具来研究非绝热动力学过程
AI.method: 在Q-Chem中实现RI-CC2的解析梯度和非绝热耦合向量，采用两种互补方法：降维振动耦合模型和全维从头算on-the-fly轨迹表面跳跃模拟，使用基于RI-CC2数据训练的神经网络加速动力学计算
AI.result: 发现暗态A1u积极参与内转换过程，RI-CC2识别Q9a和Q8a振动模式为A1u和B3u之间相干布居转移的关键驱动因素，on-the-fly动力学重现了实验观测的26 fs B2u布居衰减时间（实验值22±3 fs）
AI.conclusion: RI-CC2是研究超快内转换的有效方法，生成的高质量数据集为未来机器学习发展提供宝贵资源，随机变体sRI-CC2有望将此类动力学扩展到更大的分子体系

title: Nematic Phase Transitions and Density Modulations in 1D Flat Band Condensates
summary: We investigate the ground-state properties of one-dimensional Gross-Pitaevskii flat-band lattices. We uncover a geometry-driven phase transition into a macroscopically degenerate nematic state with broken time reversal symmetry. Focusing on all-bands-flat (ABF) models, we demonstrate that even infinitesimal onsite interactions can destabilize a uniform, constant-phase condensate, driving the system into a nematic manifold as the flat-band geometry controlled parameter $θ\geq π/8$. At a critical endpoint (\(θ=π/4\)), where the compact localized states exhibit constant amplitudes, we identify an additional pair of density-modulated ground states characterized by vanishing phase stiffness. Utilizing Bogoliubov-de Gennes excitations and simulated annealing, we show that these density-modulated phases are thermally selected at low temperatures via an order-by-disorder mechanism. Finally, we demonstrate that these non-trivial condensate phases extend beyond ABF models, as exemplified by the sawtooth lattice. Our findings also reveal that the sound velocity in flat-band condensates is a sensitive probe of the underlying geometric phase structure.

AI.tldr: 一维Gross-Pitaevskii平带晶格中，几何驱动的相变导致宏观简并向列态，具有时间反演对称性破缺。在平带几何参数θ≥π/8时，即使无限小的在位相互作用也能破坏均匀凝聚，进入向列流形。在临界点θ=π/4处，出现具有消失相位刚度的密度调制基态，通过无序有序机制在低温下热选择。
AI.motivation: 研究一维Gross-Pitaevskii平带晶格的基态性质，探索几何结构如何驱动相变和对称性破缺，理解平带系统中相互作用和几何效应的耦合机制。
AI.method: 采用全平带模型，分析平带几何参数θ的影响。使用Bogoliubov-de Gennes激发和模拟退火方法研究激发谱和热选择机制。在锯齿晶格等非全平带模型中验证结果的普适性。
AI.result: 发现几何驱动的相变进入宏观简并向列态，具有时间反演对称性破缺。在θ≥π/8时，无限小相互作用即可破坏均匀凝聚。在临界点θ=π/4处，识别出密度调制基态，具有消失的相位刚度，通过无序有序机制在低温下热选择。声速可作为平带凝聚体几何相位结构的敏感探针。
AI.conclusion: 平带几何结构能够驱动非平庸的凝聚相变，产生宏观简并向列态和密度调制相。这些相不仅存在于全平带模型，也扩展到更一般的平带系统。几何相位结构对凝聚体性质有重要影响，声速可作为其敏感探针。

title: Nonlinear thermal gradient induced magnetization in $d^{\prime }$, $g^{\prime }$ and $i^{\prime }$ altermagnets
summary: It is a highly nontrivial question whether a magnetization can be induced by applying a nonlinear temperature gradient in the absence of any linear component. In this work, we address this issue and provide explicit examples demonstrating that such a response can indeed arise. The spin-split band structures of $d$-wave, $g$-wave, $i$-wave altermagnets are characterized by $k^{N_{X}}\sin N_{X}φ$, where $N_{X}=2,4$ and $6$, respectively. In contrast, the corresponding $d^{\prime }$-wave, $g^{\prime } $-wave, $i^{\prime }$-wave altermagnets are described by $k^{N_{X}}\cos N_{X}φ$. We show that a finite magnetization is induced in the $d^{\prime }$-wave, $g^{\prime }$-wave, $i^{\prime }$-wave altermagnets under a second-order nonlinear temperature gradient, whereas no such response occurs in the $d$-wave, $g$-wave, $i$-wave altermagnets. This constitutes the leading-order contribution because the linear response is forbidden by inversion symmetry. Furthermore, we derive analytic expressions for the induced magnetization in the high-temperature regime. We also demonstrate that no analogous nonlinear thermal response appears in $p$-wave, $f$-wave, $p^{\prime }$-wave and $f^{\prime }$-wave odd-parity magnets.

AI.tldr: 该研究证明在无线性温度梯度的情况下，仅通过非线性温度梯度可以在特定类型的altermagnet中诱导出磁化，其中d'波、g'波、i'波altermagnet会产生响应，而d波、g波、i波altermagnet则不会。
AI.motivation: 探索在无任何线性温度梯度分量的情况下，仅通过非线性温度梯度是否能够诱导磁化响应，这是一个高度非平凡的问题。研究旨在解决这一基础物理问题，并寻找具体的材料体系来实现这种效应。
AI.method: 通过分析不同波对称性的altermagnet的能带结构：d波、g波、i波altermagnet由k^N_X sin N_X φ描述，而d'波、g'波、i'波altermagnet由k^N_X cos N_X φ描述。研究计算了这些体系在二阶非线性温度梯度下的响应，并在高温极限下推导了解析表达式。
AI.result: 发现d'波、g'波、i'波altermagnet在二阶非线性温度梯度下会产生有限磁化，而d波、g波、i波altermagnet则不会产生这种响应。这是主导阶贡献，因为线性响应被反演对称性禁止。同时发现p波、f波、p'波和f'波奇宇称磁体不会出现类似的非线性热响应。
AI.conclusion: 研究首次证明仅通过非线性温度梯度可以在特定对称性的altermagnet中诱导磁化，为热-自旋转换提供了新的机制，并揭示了不同波对称性altermagnet在非线性热响应中的根本差异。

title: Stability and superstructural ordering of alkali-triel-pnictide clathrates A$_8$T$_{27}$Pn$_{19}$
summary: Clathrates are a class of inclusion compounds that offer various useful and surprising phenomena, including superconductivity, thermoelectricity, and the potential for high-density ion storage. Stability conditions within the Alkali-Triel-Pnictide A$_8$T$_{27}$Pn$_{19}$ family of unconventional clathrates are investigated with high-throughput density functional theory calculations, establishing trends in formation energy, structural and electronic properties. Electronic structure calculations and first-principles molecular dynamics simulations show that the ionization potential of guest alkaline atoms strongly influences the stability of electron-exact clathrates and affects their rattler behavior. Targeted reactive synthesis from elemental precursors is attempted, resulting in two novel ternary compounds. However, the targeted clathrate phases are not obtained. Further analysis reveals that the stability of ATPn clathrate compounds containing heavy elements, such as bismuth, depends strongly on spin-orbit effects, which are often neglected in high-throughput studies that compute formation energies. Finally, chemically induced superstructural ordering is described in relation to Wyckoff sites in the prototypical type-I clathrate unit cell.

AI.tldr: 研究通过高通量DFT计算探索A₈T₂₇Pn₁₉非常规包合物稳定性，发现客体碱金属电离势影响电子精确包合物稳定性，合成出两种新三元化合物但未获得目标包合物相，揭示重元素包合物稳定性受自旋轨道效应显著影响。
AI.motivation: 包合物具有超导、热电和高密度离子存储等有用特性，但非常规包合物A₈T₂₇Pn₁₉家族的稳定性条件尚不清楚，需要系统研究其形成能、结构和电子性质趋势。
AI.method: 采用高通量密度泛函理论计算研究形成能、结构和电子性质趋势；通过电子结构计算和第一性原理分子动力学模拟分析客体碱金属电离势的影响；尝试从元素前体进行目标反应合成；分析自旋轨道效应对重元素包合物稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 客体碱金属电离势强烈影响电子精确包合物稳定性及其rattler行为；合成出两种新三元化合物但未获得目标包合物相；发现含重元素（如铋）的包合物稳定性强烈依赖于常被高通量研究忽略的自旋轨道效应；描述了化学诱导超结构有序化与原型I型包合物单胞Wyckoff位点的关系。
AI.conclusion: 非常规包合物稳定性受多种因素影响，包括客体电离势和自旋轨道效应，这些因素在传统高通量研究中常被忽略，对重元素包合物的设计合成具有重要意义。

title: Topologically shadowed quantum criticality: A non-compact conformal manifold
summary: We put forward a proposal for topological quantum critical points (tQCPs) separating non-invertible chiral topological orders in $(2+1)$ dimensions. We conjecture that these tQCPs can be captured by a family of scale-invariant field theories forming a non-compact scale-invariant manifold. A central feature of our proposal is topological shadowing: the underlying critical theory is rigorously constrained by the global topological data of the two adjacent gapped phases. These theories can be further projected into quantum field theories with universal non-local structures. Specifically, we show that the quantum dynamics of the $U(1)$ symmetric critical point uniquely characterized by a topological angle $Θ_{\text{cft}}$ -- which is defined by a commutator between two Wilson loop operators on a torus -- is determined by the braiding angles $Θ_{1,2}$ of the adjacent gapped phases via the relation $Θ_{\text{cft}}^{-1} =\frac{1}{2}[Θ_1^{-1} + Θ_2^{-1}]$. Despite the non-locality, our renormalization group calculations (up to two-loop order) strongly suggest that the theory shall maintain exact scale invariance. This establishes, without supersymmetry, a continuous manifold of fixed points that naturally becomes a conformal manifold when the local structure is further enforced.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种拓扑量子临界点理论，用于分离(2+1)维中的非可逆手性拓扑序，这些临界点由形成非紧致尺度不变流形的场论描述，具有拓扑阴影特征。
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑量子临界点的理论描述，特别是那些分离非可逆手性拓扑序的临界点，探索尺度不变场论如何捕获这些临界现象，并建立临界理论与相邻拓扑相之间的严格关系。
AI.method: 提出拓扑量子临界点理论框架，引入拓扑阴影概念，使用U(1)对称临界点作为具体例子，通过威尔逊环算符对易子定义拓扑角Θ_cft，建立与相邻拓扑相编织角的关系公式，并进行两圈重整化群计算验证尺度不变性。
AI.result: 建立了拓扑量子临界点与相邻拓扑相之间的精确关系：Θ_cft^{-1} = 1/2[Θ_1^{-1} + Θ_2^{-1}]，重整化群计算表明理论保持精确尺度不变性，在没有超对称的情况下建立了连续固定点流形。
AI.conclusion: 成功提出了描述拓扑量子临界点的理论框架，证明了临界理论与相邻拓扑相之间的严格约束关系，建立了连续尺度不变固定点流形，为理解拓扑相变提供了新的理论工具。

title: Composition design of refractory compositionally complex alloys using machine learning models
comment: 32 pages including 12 pages of SI, 6 figures in manuscript and 6 figures in SI, 50 references
summary: Refractory compositionally complex alloys (RCCAs) are considered the next generation high-temperature materials. However, their high-dimensional composition spaces are too large to explore by traditional density functional theory or experimental means, making new RCCA discovery slow and cumbersome. This work has addressed these challenges with an integrated composition design framework that can efficiently and exhaustively explore the relationship between the compositions and two fundamental aspects: 1) the phase stability, including the target body-centered cubic (BCC) phase and its competing phases (hexagonal closed-pack (HCP) structures, Laves and B2 intermetallic phases), and 2) the mechanical properties. This framework is demonstrated with RCCAs within nine refractory metals (Ti, V, Cr, Zr, Nb, Mo, Hf, Ta, and W). Theory-guided machine learning (ML) models were employed to find the composition-mechanical property relationship of RCCAs, where the established theory is used to supplement the yield strength data at ultra-high temperature, and a forward sequential feature selection (SFS) is used to determine feature selection. The resulting ML model for temperature-dependent yield strength was found to have an R_squared value of 0.98 over the entire temperature range (from 0 to 2000 K). The impact of each constituent element on the six key properties is evaluated. The addition of Nb tends to stabilize the BCC phase and the addition of Ti improves the ductility of RCCAs. Combined with all methods involved in this framework, the on-demand designer allows the alloy designers to have all properties for any RCCA compositions and narrow down the composition space by applying custom screening criteria. The output from the predictor and screener provides valuable guidance for our experimental study of RCCAs and accelerates the pace of materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 开发集成成分设计框架，结合理论指导机器学习，高效探索难熔复合合金的相稳定性和力学性能关系，加速新材料发现
AI.motivation: 难熔复合合金作为下一代高温材料，其高维成分空间难以通过传统DFT或实验方法全面探索，导致新材料发现缓慢
AI.method: 建立集成成分设计框架，结合理论指导的机器学习模型，使用前向顺序特征选择确定特征，探索九种难熔金属合金的相稳定性和力学性能关系
AI.result: 温度依赖屈服强度模型R平方值达0.98（0-2000K），发现Nb稳定BCC相，Ti提高延展性，开发可按需筛选合金成分的设计工具
AI.conclusion: 该框架能高效探索难熔复合合金成分-性能关系，加速新材料发现，为实验研究提供指导

title: Entanglement in the open XX chain: Rényi oscillations, hard-edge crossover, and symmetry resolution
summary: We derive closed-form asymptotic formulas for the Rényi entanglement entropies of the open XX spin-$1/2$ chain by mapping the underlying determinant of the boundary correlation matrix (which has Toeplitz-plus-Hankel structure) to a Hankel determinant with a positive weight whose large-size asymptotics follow from known Riemann--Hilbert results. An explicit evaluation of the Szegő function yields the leading $2k_F$ oscillatory amplitude and phase. A single variable $s = 2\ell \sin(k_F/2)$ organizes the hard-edge crossover as the Fermi momentum approaches the band edge: the oscillation envelope obeys $s^{\pm1/α}$ power laws and $\ln s$ is the natural leading logarithm for a clean data collapse. For detached blocks the oscillatory amplitude is numerically consistent with a factorization through the conformal cross-ratio. The same framework recovers the open-boundary-condition (OBC) equipartition offset $-\tfrac{1}{2}\log\log\ell$ for symmetry-resolved entropies, together with the known halving of the Gaussian width relative to the periodic chain.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了开放XX自旋链Rényi纠缠熵的闭式渐近公式，通过边界关联矩阵的Toeplitz+Hankel结构映射到Hankel行列式，获得振荡幅度、相位和硬边交叉行为。
AI.motivation: 研究开放边界条件下XX自旋链的纠缠熵渐近行为，特别是边界效应、振荡幅度和硬边交叉现象，为理解一维量子系统的边界纠缠特性提供理论框架。
AI.method: 将边界关联矩阵的Toeplitz+Hankel行列式映射到具有正权重的Hankel行列式，利用已知的Riemann-Hilbert方法获得大尺寸渐近结果，通过显式计算Szegő函数得到振荡幅度和相位。
AI.result: 获得了Rényi纠缠熵的闭式渐近公式，发现单变量s=2ℓsin(k_F/2)组织硬边交叉行为，振荡包络服从s^{±1/α}幂律，对数s是数据塌缩的自然对数。对于分离块，振荡幅度与共形交叉比因子化一致。恢复了OBC对称分辨熵的-½loglogℓ均分偏移。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为开放边界XX自旋链的纠缠熵提供了完整的渐近理论，揭示了边界效应、振荡行为和硬边交叉的普适特征，建立了与共形场论的联系，并推广到对称分辨熵的边界修正。

title: Room Temperature Anisotropic Photoresponse in Low-Symmetry van der Waals Semiconductor CrPS$_4$
summary: The crystalline and optical anisotropy of low-symmetry two-dimensional (2D) materials can enable strong dichroic responses, enhancing polarization contrast for photonic and optoelectronic devices. Here, we unveil pronounced optical and optoelectronic anisotropy in chromium thiophosphate CrPS$_4$ arising from the strong coupling between light polarization and its intrinsic crystal symmetry. Linearly polarized reflectivity and scanning photocurrent measurements in the 1.37-2.48 eV range reveal a robust dichroic response. The linear dichroism in reflection RLD reaches ~50, while in photocurrent PCLD it increases to ~60, with a sign reversal of the RLD between 1.6-1.8 eV, enabling strong narrow-band polarization contrast at room temperature. We attribute these anisotropic responses to the interaction between polarized light and Cr$^{3+}$ d-orbital T$_1$ and T$_2$ transitions. Spatially resolved photocurrent mapping further shows that the photocurrent is strongly dependent on the crystallographic axis: a 3-fold enhancement is obtained along the b-axis compared to the a-axis, yielding a clear 180° modulation of photoresponse across different contact orientations. Together, our findings establish CrPS$_4$ as a highly anisotropic 2D semiconductor with strong linear dichroism and polarization-sensitive photoresponse at room temperature. These characteristics highlight CrPS4 as a promising platform for narrow-band polarized photodetectors, anisotropic photo-transport, and future 2D spintronic and magneto-optical devices.

AI.tldr: CrPS4二维材料展现出强光学和光电各向异性，在室温下具有显著的线性二向色性和偏振敏感光响应，可用于窄带偏振光探测器和各向异性光电器件。
AI.motivation: 探索低对称性二维材料的光学各向异性，利用其强二向色响应增强偏振对比度，为光子和光电器件开发提供新材料平台。
AI.method: 在1.37-2.48 eV能量范围内进行线性偏振反射率和扫描光电流测量，分析CrPS4晶体在不同偏振方向下的光学和光电响应特性。
AI.result: CrPS4展现出强线性二向色性：反射线性二向色性RLD达到~50，光电流线性二向色性PCLD达到~60，在1.6-1.8 eV范围内RLD符号反转。光电流沿b轴比a轴增强3倍，呈现180°调制响应。
AI.conclusion: CrPS4是具有强光学各向异性和偏振敏感光响应的二维半导体，其特性源于偏振光与Cr3+ d轨道T1和T2跃迁的相互作用，为窄带偏振光探测器、各向异性光传输和自旋电子器件提供了有前景的平台。

title: Tractable model for a fractionalized Fermi liquid (FL$^*$) on a square lattice
summary: Motivated by the continued interest in Fermi-surface reconstruction without symmetry breaking, we present an analytically tractable microscopic model of a fractionalized Fermi liquid (FL$^*$) on a square lattice and discuss its potential relevance to the cuprates. As in ancilla-qubit constructions, the model is related to Kondo lattice systems, but in this case, the conduction electrons interact with a $\mathbb{Z}_2$ spin liquid of the Yao--Lee type, with a Majorana Fermi surface. The associated $\mathbb Z_2$ gauge theory is static so that the model can be analytically solved to leading-logarithic accuracy. There are two phases: one in which the fractionalized fermions of the spin liquid hybridize with conduction electrons to form a common Fermi surface violating the naive Luttinger count, and one in which they remain decoupled. We discuss the salient features of the small Fermi-surface phase, including analytically derived momentum dependent coherence factors responsible for the appearance of Fermi arcs à la Yang-Rice-Zhang. We further discuss the impact of quantum and thermal fluctuations, including a strong diamagnetic response and a logarithmically divergent Sommerfeld coefficient at the onset of the pseudogap.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可解析处理的微观模型，研究分数化费米液体在铜氧化物中的潜在相关性，展示小费米面相的特征
AI.motivation: 研究无对称性破缺的费米面重构现象，探索分数化费米液体在铜氧化物超导体中的潜在应用
AI.method: 构建方晶格上的分数化费米液体微观模型，使用Z2自旋液体与传导电子相互作用，通过静态Z2规范理论进行解析求解
AI.result: 发现两个相：一个形成违反Luttinger计数的小费米面相，另一个保持解耦；小费米面相具有动量依赖相干因子，产生费米弧特征
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解铜氧化物中的赝隙现象提供了理论框架，展示了分数化费米液体的特征响应，包括强抗磁性和对数发散Sommerfeld系数

title: Historical Foundation and Practical Guideline for Ferroelectric Switching Kinetic Studies
summary: Electrical measurements of ferroelectric switching kinetics are widely used to probe the dynamics of polarization reversal, yet the influence of the measurement circuit is often underappreciated. In this paper, we show that the interplay between ferroelectric capacitors and circuit elements produces distorted, time-dependent voltage waveforms across the device, particularly in the sub-ns regime. We examine how these circuit contributions affect polarization transients extracted from PUND measurements. The resulting distortions scale with supply voltage, capacitor dimensions, and lumped circuit elements, but are not accounted for in conventional experimental analyses or analytical model fitting. We then critically assess existing nucleation and growth models and show that neglecting the time-varying voltage profile can lead to unphysical interpretations of switching kinetics, most notably in the extracted growth dimensionality represented by the Avrami exponent. Finally, we outline guidelines for future studies, emphasizing the need for direct voltage monitoring and circuit-aware de-embedding, as well as modeling frameworks that incorporate voltage-dependent nucleation and growth rates based on intrinsic material parameters.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出，传统铁电开关动力学测量中常忽略电路影响，导致电压波形失真，进而影响对极化反转动力学的准确分析。
AI.motivation: 铁电开关动力学的电学测量被广泛用于研究极化反转动力学，但测量电路的影响常被低估。特别是在亚纳秒时间尺度，铁电器件与电路元件之间的相互作用会产生失真的电压波形，影响对内在材料参数的准确提取。
AI.method: 研究分析了铁电电容器与电路元件的相互作用如何产生失真、随时间变化的电压波形，特别关注亚纳秒时间尺度。通过PUND测量提取的极化瞬态响应，评估了电路贡献的影响。这些失真与电源电压、电容器尺寸和集总电路元件相关，但在传统实验分析和解析模型拟合中未被考虑。
AI.result: 研究发现，忽略随时间变化的电压分布会导致对开关动力学的非物理解释，特别是在提取的Avrami指数所代表的生长维度方面。电路引起的失真会显著影响对成核和生长模型的准确评估。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需要采用直接电压监测和电路感知的去嵌入技术，以及基于内在材料参数的电压依赖性成核和生长速率的建模框架。必须考虑电路影响才能获得对铁电开关动力学的准确理解。

title: Magnetic toroidal monopoles from relativistic polarization responses to magnetic field gradients
summary: The magnetic toroidal monopole, a time-reversal-odd scalar, has attracted attention through its characteristic responses, such as electric-field-induced nonreciprocal directional dichroism observed in Co$_2$SiO$_4$. However, its evaluation in crystalline solids remains unresolved, as it cannot be defined within conventional multipole expansions or thermodynamic formulations. In this paper, we propose a theoretical framework to evaluate the magnetic toroidal monopole in periodic crystals based on the response of relativistic electric polarization to a magnetic field gradient. By incorporating the magnetic-field-gradient correction to the relativistic polarization, we derive an explicit expression for the magnetic toroidal monopole beyond symmetry arguments. The resulting expression is formulated in terms of geometric quantity such as Berry curvatures and orbital magnetic moment defined in an extended parameter space spanning momentum, magnetic field, and electric field. We further perform model calculations for an antiferromagnetic system hosting a magnetic toroidal monopole and confirm that the proposed quantity is finite. These results provide a practical route to characterize magnetic toroidal monopoles in crystalline solids and clarify their quantum geometric nature.

AI.tldr: 提出评估周期性晶体中磁环形单极子的理论框架，基于相对论电极化对磁场梯度的响应，推导出超越对称性论证的明确表达式。
AI.motivation: 磁环形单极子作为时间反演奇标量，在晶体固体中的评估尚未解决，因为它无法在传统的多极展开或热力学公式中定义。
AI.method: 通过将磁场梯度修正纳入相对论极化，推导出磁环形单极子的显式表达式，该表达式用扩展参数空间（动量、磁场、电场）中的几何量（如贝里曲率和轨道磁矩）表示。
AI.result: 对具有磁环形单极子的反铁磁系统进行模型计算，确认所提出的量是有限的，为表征晶体固体中的磁环形单极子提供了实用途径。
AI.conclusion: 建立了评估周期性晶体中磁环形单极子的理论框架，阐明了其量子几何本质，为实验表征提供了理论基础。

title: ORION: Unifying Top-Down and Bottom-Up Chemical Space Sampling for a Universal Organic Force Field
summary: Empirical force fields remain the primary tool for large-scale molecular simulation, yet their limited flexibility and transferability often hinder predictive modeling in chemically complex condensed-phase systems. Here we present ORION, a universal machine-learning force field for C, H, O, N, S, and P systems developed within the Neuroevolution Potential (NEP) framework. To enhance transferability across diverse chemical environments, ORION was trained on a chemically rich dataset constructed through an integrated top-down and bottom-up strategy, enabling accurate descriptions of complex organic configurations, reactive intermediates, and weak intermolecular interactions. ORION achieves near-density-functional-theory accuracy while retaining the efficiency required for large-scale molecular dynamics simulations. On the test set, it predicts atomic forces with substantially higher accuracy than ReaxFF while running 215.5 times faster under identical hardware conditions, making simulations on the hundreds-of-nanoseconds timescale readily accessible. The model provides a balanced description of bond breaking and formation, aromatic growth, hydrogen bonding, van der Waals interactions, and π-stacking, demonstrating strong transferability across both reactive and nonreactive systems. These results establish ORION as a practical and general force field for predictive simulations in chemistry and materials science, and provide an effective route toward universal machine-learning force fields with both high accuracy and broad applicability.

AI.tldr: ORION是一个基于神经进化势能的通用机器学习力场，覆盖C、H、O、N、S、P元素，在保持计算效率的同时达到接近DFT的精度，比ReaxFF快215.5倍。
AI.motivation: 传统经验力场在化学复杂凝聚相系统中的灵活性和可迁移性有限，阻碍了预测建模的发展。需要开发既准确又高效的通用力场来支持大规模分子动力学模拟。
AI.method: 在神经进化势能框架下开发ORION力场，采用自上而下和自下而上相结合的策略构建化学丰富的训练数据集，涵盖复杂有机构型、反应中间体和弱分子间相互作用。
AI.result: ORION在测试集上预测原子力的精度显著高于ReaxFF，同时运行速度快215.5倍，能够在相同硬件条件下实现数百纳秒时间尺度的模拟。模型在键断裂与形成、芳香环生长、氢键、范德华相互作用和π-π堆积等方面表现出平衡的描述能力。
AI.conclusion: ORION为化学和材料科学中的预测模拟提供了一个实用且通用的力场，为实现兼具高精度和广泛适用性的通用机器学习力场提供了有效途径。

title: Quantitative analysis of fluctuating hydrodynamics in uniform shear flow
summary: Many theoretical predictions in fluctuating hydrodynamics under uniform shear flow have lacked precise quantitative verification due to analytical approximations whose quantitative impacts are difficult to assess a priori and the limitations of microscopic particle-based simulations. To address this problem, we perform direct numerical simulations (DNS) of the fluctuating Navier-Stokes (NS) equations with shear-periodic boundary conditions. We provide a decisive quantitative validation of two seminal frameworks: the Lutsko-Dufty theory for nonequilibrium long-range correlations, and the dynamic renormalization group (RG) theory by Forster, Nelson, and Stephen (FNS) for anomalous transport. By simulating the linearized fluctuating NS equations, we demonstrate that the predictions of the Lutsko-Dufty theory are quantitatively valid from the viscous-dominated, long-wavelength regime to the shear-dominated, short-wavelength regime, well beyond their originally assumed limits. Moving beyond the linearized equations, we simulate the full nonlinear fluctuating NS equations to test the quantitative predictive capability of the dynamical RG approach by FNS. Our results show that the one-loop RG prediction remains quantitatively accurate up to a strongly nonlinear regime, where conventional perturbation theory fails. Our findings solidify the foundations of these classical theories, paving the way for quantitative analyses using fluctuating hydrodynamics.

AI.tldr: 通过直接数值模拟验证了两种经典涨落流体力学理论：Lutsko-Dufty非平衡长程关联理论和FNS动态重整化群理论，证明它们在超出原假设范围的强非线性区域仍保持定量准确性。
AI.motivation: 均匀剪切流下的涨落流体力学理论预测缺乏精确的定量验证，因为分析方法存在难以先验评估的近似，且微观粒子模拟有局限性。
AI.method: 采用剪切周期边界条件，对涨落Navier-Stokes方程进行直接数值模拟：1) 线性化方程验证Lutsko-Dufty理论；2) 完整非线性方程验证FNS动态重整化群理论。
AI.result: Lutsko-Dufty理论从粘性主导的长波区域到剪切主导的短波区域都保持定量有效；FNS的一圈重整化群预测在常规微扰论失效的强非线性区域仍保持定量准确性。
AI.conclusion: 这些经典理论的定量准确性得到证实，为使用涨落流体力学进行定量分析奠定了基础。

title: Robust quantized thermal conductance of Majorana floating edge bands in d-wave superconductors
summary: We propose and characterize a new class of Majorana boundary states, i.e., floating Majorana edge bands (FMEBs), which emerge in two-dimensional (2D) superconductors that break time-reversal symmetry yet host helical-like transport. In contrast to conventional chiral or helical edge modes, FMEBs form isolated, momentum-separated counterpropagating Majorana modes detached from the bulk continuum. We identify a minimal mechanism for their emergence via anisotropic Wilson masses in a two-band Bogoliubov-de Gennes (BdG) model, and demonstrate their microscopic realization in a quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) insulator proximitized by a $d$-wave superconductor. Using nonequilibrium Green's function (NEGF) simulations, we uncover clear transport fingerprints: a quantized total thermal conductance in two-terminal devices, and a robust half-quantized plateau in four-terminal geometries that cleanly distinguishes FMEBs from chiral $\mathcal{N}= \pm 2$ QAH phases. This thermal response remains remarkably stable under finite temperature, moderate long-range disorder, and finite chemical potential. Our findings establish FMEBs as an experimentally accessible route toward helical-like Majorana transport in systems without time-reversal symmetry, with direct implications for topological quantum computation.

AI.tldr: 提出并表征了一类新型马约拉纳边界态——浮动马约拉纳边缘带（FMEBs），这种态在破坏时间反演对称性的二维超导体中出现，具有类螺旋输运特性。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑超导体中的手性或螺旋边缘模式通常依赖于时间反演对称性。本研究旨在探索在时间反演对称性破缺的系统中实现类螺旋马约拉纳输运的可能性，这对于拓扑量子计算具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过各向异性威尔逊质量机制在两带Bogoliubov-de Gennes模型中构建FMEBs；在d波超导体近邻耦合的量子反常霍尔绝缘体中实现微观模型；使用非平衡格林函数方法进行输运模拟。
AI.result: 发现清晰的输运特征：双端器件中量子化的总热导，四端几何中稳健的半量子化平台；该热响应在有限温度、适度长程无序和有限化学势下保持稳定，能够清晰区分FMEBs与手性QAH相。
AI.conclusion: FMEBs为在无时间反演对称性系统中实现类螺旋马约拉纳输运提供了实验可实现的途径，对拓扑量子计算具有直接意义。

title: Chemical Short-Range Order Regulates Hydrogen Energetics and Hydrogen-Dislocation Interactions in CoNiV
summary: Chemical short-range order (CSRO) has emerged as a critical structural feature in concentrated alloys, yet its coupling with hydrogen remains an active discussion. Here, we develop a machine-learning interatomic potential for the Co-Ni-V-H system and investigate how CSRO regulates hydrogen energetics and dislocation behavior in CoNiV, an alloy with reported strong resistance to hydrogen embrittlement. We identify strong V-centered ordering that suppresses V-V clustering and significantly reshapes the hydrogen solution landscape.
